title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Amazon India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Amazon India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Amazon India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!
